name: get_sensor_details
description: Get details about a sensor and its current readings including asset info, location, thresholds, and recent readings history.

sensor_id.description: The sensor ID (e.g. TEMP-001, VIB-003, PRESS-002)

name: query_maintenance_history
description: Query the maintenance history for an asset. Returns past work orders, repairs, part replacements, and downtime records.

name: check_parts_inventory
description: Check parts inventory for availability, stock levels, lead time, and warehouse location.

part_number.description: Part number to check (e.g. BRG-6205, SEAL-42X62)

asset_id.description: Asset ID to look up compatible parts for

name: create_work_order
description: Create a work order in the CMMS system. Returns a draft work order for human approval. The work order is NOT submitted until the user explicitly approves it.

description.description: Description of the work to be performed

name: approve_work_order
description: Submit an approved work order to the CMMS. Only call this AFTER the user has explicitly approved the work order draft.

work_order_id.description: The work order ID to approve (from create_work_order response)

name: send_technician_alert
description: Send an email alert to the assigned technician with work order details. Only call this AFTER the work order has been approved.
